title: cynoglossum dielsii
intro: Cynoglossum dielsii, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to China. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum dielsii include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
